description:
Implement `hx-theme` (T4 Infrastructure) — theme provider that injects CSS custom property tokens for a named theme onto a scoped root element.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-theme/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-theme.ts`, `hx-theme.styles.ts`, `hx-theme.stories.ts`, `hx-theme.test.ts`

**Props:** `theme` (string — theme name, e.g. `"light"`, `"dark"`, `"high-contrast"`), `system` (boolean — auto-detect from `prefers-color-scheme`)

**Slots:** default (wrapped content)

**CSS Parts:** `base`

**Implementation:** On `:host`, set all `--hx-*` CSS custom properties for the specified theme. Use `adoptedStyleSheets` or injected `<style>` with `:host { --hx-color-primary: ...; --hx-spacing-md: ...; }`. Study existing token structure in `packages/hx-library/src/` to understand current `--hx-*` token naming.

**Theme switching:** When `theme` prop changes, swap the CSS property values. When `system` is true, listen to `prefers-color-scheme` media query changes.

**ARIA:** No ARIA role. This is a pure theming utility. The `<hx-theme>` wrapper is `display: contents` so it doesn't affect layout.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (theme switching, system detection, token values), axe-core zero violations, Storybook with light/dark/high-contrast demos, bundle < 3KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-theme — T4 Theme Provider/CSS Token Root
